items.title: Laura Marling Surprise Releases New Album… of Raffi Covers
items.summary: The singer-songwriter says Laura Sings Raffi marks “a logical next step” for her

items.title: Navy Blue’s New Album Features Ka, Earl Sweatshirt, and James Earl Jones
items.summary: Sir Render also boasts an impressive roaster of producers, including the Alchemist and Navy Blue himself

items.title: Skrillex Drops Another Surprise Album
items.summary: Soma features Tracey, Blawan, and Young Miko, among others

items.title: Tinashe Knows Fame Is “Too Easy” on New Song
items.summary: Co-produced by Kimj and Zack Sekoff, the single is her first original material in two years
